message:
Refactor setup.service.ts to use ToolRegistry as primary source (bd-20kj)

- Update toToolInfo() to work without requiring fallback entries
- Registry tools no longer filtered by hardcoded TOOL_INFO
- Required tools loaded directly from registry without TOOL_INFO filter
- Hardcoded TOOL_INFO now only provides field-level fallbacks
- Added debug logging for registry loading

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
